creator: neil@darlow.co.uk
text:
Hi,

The committer took it upon himself to add a PKGNAMESUFFIX entry
(presumably to quiet a portlint warning) but didn't change the PORTNAME
line to compensate.

The original submission wasn't broken and other squirrelmail plugin
ports follow the same naming convention. I would have appreciated some
notice of such a change being made.

Regards,
Neil Darlow
